name: Rich and Creamy Refried Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 t Salsa Verde, Hot Green Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the beans and sour cream, blending thoroughly.
2. Blend in all of the other ingredients except the garnish, blending well.
3. Cover and chill.
4. Garnish with the cheddar cheese just before serving.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Cucumber, Cheese Crackers, Jicama, Broccoli
